name: Waverley Capital Acquisition Corp. 1 Class A Ordinary Shares
summary: Waverley Capital Acquisition Corp. 1 Class A Ordinary Shares is a special purpose acquisition company (SPAC) formed to effect a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. SPACs are typically blank check companies that seek to identify and acquire private companies. It is headquartered in the United States.
